trajectory.description: Observation: CRN model has channel mismatch in decoder - skip connections double channels but decoder expects different size. Analysis: Need to fix the U-Net architecture to properly handle skip connections (concatenation doubles channels). Decision: Rewrite model.py with a clean CRN architecture, fix the channel math, and train for 5 epochs to validate.
